name: Mr Raw
description: '''Okechukwu Edwards Ukeje''' ({{Audio|LL-Q33578 (ibo)-Ebube Clara-Okechukwu Edwards Ukeje.wav|listen}}; born 1 November 1974) better known as '''Mr Raw''' (formerly '''Dat Nigga Raw'''), is a Nigerian rapper and songwriter. Born and raised in [[Enugu (city)|Enugu]], and a native of [[Abia State]], he is a pioneer of [[Igbo rap]].
